programme.desc: Four legendary Korean professional baseball players take on a new challenge as coaches of U-10 youth baseball teams. As each legend leads a team representing his former club's home region, a fierce battle for local pride begins.

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: Age is just a number-attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: The Logic Of The Many - The Swarm Principle
programme.desc: Researchers are investigating how animals behave in swarms. Their findings are being applied to robotics, logistics and new models of participation - and are opening up new perspectives for business and democracy.

programme.title: The Current Affairs Documentary
programme.desc: The weekly half-hour program delivers in-depth reporting on topical political issues and newsworthy events. Revealing the story behind the stories, 'Close up' is informative, gripping and visually powerful.

programme.title: Romania - Torn Between Work And Home
programme.desc: In the 1990s, many Romanians left their homeland in search of work. They left behind deserted villages: children were raised by their grandparents, the elderly lived alone, and communities fell apart.

programme.title: E318 - Pups In A Jam / Pups Save A Windsurfing Pig

programme.title: E401 - Backpack's Charm
programme.desc: Dora and Boots help Backpack find her lost friendship charm and make it even better than before!

programme.title: E114 - Gasquatch

programme.title: E110 - Surf / Spaceship / Pizza

programme.title: E251 - Sleepover
programme.desc: Peppa is going for a sleepover at Zoe Zebra's house with Suzy Sheep, Rebecca Rabbit, Candy Cat and Emily Elephant. The girls stay up playing games and having fun. At last they feel sleepy. They all snuggle up in their sleeping bags and fall asleep.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E68
programme.desc: The 114th drama serial follows two women, Rin (Mikami Ai) and Naomi (Kosaka Juri), who paved the way for nursing in the Meiji era. Each carries her own struggles, yet together they support one another as they race to protect the wounded and vulnerable, often standing up against powerful forces. Through conflicts and hardships, the two gradually grow. No matter which way the wind blows, this unconventional duo continues their journey in search of happiness.

programme.title: E3 - A Big Playtime Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a big playtime sing-along with Mia & Max! First, they play a fun fishing game in the garden with Mummy & Daddy, learning their colors as they catch different colored fish. Then, Mia & Maple learn to play together by setting up a super cute tea party with all their cuddly toys. The playtime fun continues as Mia & Max pretend to be puppies, crawling & barking while singing the classic song 'BINGO!' with their parents.

programme.title: E1 - Learning to Do the Right Thing!
programme.desc: Join Buster as he learns to do the right thing! When Buster accidentally breaks the class flower, he panics & tries to cover it up, but soon learns that telling the truth is always the best thing to do. Then, when he & Daddy spot a steam train speeding out of control, they know they have to do the right thing! They race after the train & save the day! From cleaning up his toys to helping a puppy, Buster is always trying to do the right thing.

programme.title: E12 - Baby John's Dino Birthday!
programme.desc: It's Baby John's birthday! Join him as he celebrates with face painting, dinosaur masks, and a bouncy castle. He also celebrates his dino toy's birthday and tries to figure out what's inside all of his presents.

programme.title: E13 - A Birthday Full of Surprises!
programme.desc: It's a day of celebrations with Baby John! First, it's his birthday with cake and presents. Then, he accidentally ruins his sister Jill's spa party. Finally, he uses his imagination to travel to a prehistoric world for Dino's birthday!

programme.title: E6 - JJ's Birthday Surprise
programme.desc: Join JJ for his birthday celebration! His friends and family are setting up a surprise party, but things keep going wrong. From a party bus to a farm adventure and even a train ride, celebrate with games, gifts, and a hunt for Bingo!

programme.title: E13 - A Birthday Full of Surprises!
programme.desc: It's a day of celebrations with Baby John! First, it's his birthday with cake and presents. Then, he accidentally ruins his sister Jill's spa party. Finally, he uses his imagination to travel to a prehistoric world for Dino's birthday!

programme.title: E6 - A Very Happy Birthday!
programme.desc: Join Cody for a fantastic birthday adventure at Dinoland! Afterward, ride the bus with his family, play peek-a-boo, and welcome his new baby sister, Kendi. It's a day of family fun, games, and sweet surprises.

programme.title: E4 - A Guide To Fun & Healthy Days!
programme.desc: Blippi is your guide to having fun & healthy days! First, have some fun in the sun while learning from Señor Super Sunscreen how to apply sunscreen properly. Then, shrink down with Blippi & Meekah as they travel to Italy to learn how to make an authentic pizza! The adventure continues as Blippi helps a bear get ready for winter hibernation. After a long day of fun, it's time for bed, as a magical book reads a bedtime story about the benefits of a good night's rest!

programme.title: Innovation In Sync, Pioneering The Front!
programme.desc: Innovation in Sync, Pioneering the Front! 'The Frontiers' is your direct link to innovation, powered by the Shenzhen Media Group's AI Lab and China's largest AI models. Get the lowdown on groundbreaking trends-it's all here, served fresh and hot. With our forward-thinking geniuses, every episode is a thrilling journey into the future that's closer than you might think! This program will start in May 27th, tune in every night at 21:20 for a riveting 15-minute exploration.

programme.title: Gba Financial News
programme.desc: GBA Financial News is a daily news program on Shenzhen TV. The 10-minute show covers global financial headlines and offers authoritative insights into the latest economic trends.

programme.title: Reveal Time
programme.desc: The prospective touch the nature and human history and future, such as technology and occult in all areas. programme.title: News Of Shenzhen
programme.desc: Presented as a leisurely variety show, the program revolves around the theme: 'Seek Paradise Along the Journey to Kunlun Mountain.' Throughout their travels, the adventurers will uncover lesser-known towns, each exuding its own unique charm. They will explore the distinctive characteristics of these hidden gems, savoring every street and lane, as well as every bite and sip. This immersive experience seeks to rediscover the essence of life, allowing our weary hearts to shine anew amidst the dust of daily grind.

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E5 - David Walliams
programme.desc: In Bear’s Mission with David Walliams, David is taken way out of his comfort zone, on a journey across one of Devon’s most spectacular and rugged valleys.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: E3 - Operation Rhino: White Rhino Dehorning & Black Rhino GPS Tech Implant!
programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E1 - South Australia
programme.desc: In the first part of the episode, Andy explores sustainable kingfish farming in Spencer Gulf, South Australia, visiting Clean Seas sea farm and preparing fresh kingfish sashimi with the team. Moving to Kangaroo Island, he learns pickling techniques with Kate from Kangaroo Island Source, showcasing her products in a Carne Asada Taco. The episode continues with Andy exploring d'Arenberg's multi-function building and 'The Cube,' experiencing a Chef's Table, and concludes at Wirra Wirra winery, where he cooks Yogurt Flatbread with Olive Oil and Dukka, enjoying it with the staff and their wines.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.desc: Coyote dehorns a white rhino and implants a GPS tracker into a rare black rhino!

programme.title: E3 - You Call That an Explosion?
programme.desc: Chris and Wayner forgo family time between performances to join local racer and wild man, Billy for an afternoon of shooting guns and blowing stuff up, while Brooke's mounting frustration doesn’t fare well for their return.

programme.title: E5 - Highlight 5
programme.desc: In this episode a 40-ton lorry rammed full of scrap metal overturns and spills its steel load across a major A road during rush hour, and Lantern recovery op Steve Knight is called to the scene. 25 tonnes of metal must be removed from the lorry before it can be lifted and with a damaged 5th wheel, it’s a job that will push Steve and his team to the limit. At Crouch HQ there’s excitement in the air as the team give trucking superfan Chris and his disabled daughter, the ride of his life by taking him to his wedding in a big orange truck. Late at night, recovery op Snod is called to the side of the M69 to recover two crashed cars. With one on its side with the hand brake off, he must take care righting it to make sure it doesn’t roll into the passing traffic. It’s particularly tough job for Snod as his friend was killed on the same stretch of road whilst recovering a vehicle.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: E1 - Back to School
programme.desc: Start a promising new term at the Orangutan Jungle School in Borneo. See newbie Bumi struggle to focus, track skittish Rumba’s first timid steps toward independence, and cheer on star student Valentino as he experiences a bumpy start to college.

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: E4 - Mvula's Journey
programme.desc: Mvula is the youngest calf in the Madzi family. Temperatures are soaring. Lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water: the Luangwa River.

programme.title: E1 - Born to Be Different
programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E2 - Winged Weirdos
programme.desc: One uses a mustache to attract mates and another has a bill so big, it needs special vertebrae to carry it. Learn how nature's flying iconoclasts have evolved their appearance in order to survive.

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.desc: This episode of Amazing Animal Friends features a duck that won’t go in the water without a ride from her pooch pal, an elephant that thinks she’s a buffalo, and a herd of cows that adopt an orphaned deer.

programme.title: E2 - Namib: Land Of Extremes
programme.desc: The Namib Desert is a land of extremes, from icy ocean to baking sand. It takes toughness and adaptation to live in this desert, and only a special few can. From the sidewinding adder to the fog-collecting beetle, each animal has their tricks for survival in the Namib.

programme.title: E3 - The Last Desert Giants
programme.desc: The Namib is the oldest desert in the world, hugging Africa’s shoreline for over 400 kilometers. It is one of the most inhospitable habitats on earth. Yet the world’s largest land mammal has made a home here, adapted through behavior and designed to life in the extreme.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: E4 - Mvula's Journey
programme.desc: Mvula is the youngest calf in the Madzi family. Temperatures are soaring. Lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water: the Luangwa River.

programme.title: E2 - Winged Weirdos
programme.desc: One uses a mustache to attract mates and another has a bill so big, it needs special vertebrae to carry it. Learn how nature's flying iconoclasts have evolved their appearance in order to survive.

programme.title: E3 - The Acacia Loop
programme.desc: As the dry season begins, thousands of animals are making their way to the Acacia Loop. Each must establish their place in the pecking order and avoid the dangerous residents who are all too willing to make a meal of the unwary.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E2 - A Friend in Need
programme.desc: Meet more Amazing Animal Friends including Charlotte, a schnauzer who enjoys bath time with her guinea pig pal Wallace, and a randy ram called Hamish who likes to sneak off to live with a herd of dairy cows instead of his own kind.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 寧檬一直有一個成為投資總監的職業夢想，可畢業後做的工作卻與夢想相距甚遠。她的上司陸既明是一個業務能力極強的投資總裁，他不認為寧檬也能成為合格的投資人。某一天寧檬終於下定決心離開陸既明，向他也向自己證明她可以做到。寧檬重新求職，經過種種阻礙，機緣下最終進入了鷹石投資，開始了她的晉升之路。過程中陸既明也在關注着寧檬，起初他不認可，但在重要關頭還是會對寧檬進行提點，幫助她度過難關。陸既明長遠的投資理念使寧檬獲益匪淺，寧檬也改變了陸既明的處世態度。兩人互相影響，攜手並進，經歷了無數的波折和風浪之後，寧檬蜕變成為了獨當一面的金牌投資人，陸既明也歷練得更加成熟有擔當。他們認定彼此就是自己最正確的那個人。

programme.title: E7

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

E708 - Road Trip: Screen Queen / Road Trip: Hide And Sneak
programme.desc: When the Louds' road trip takes them to Hollywood, Lola is determined to become a star and land a leading role. // To help Mom make the deadline for her column, the Louds have to avoid the Casagrandes when they visit Great Lakes City.

programme.title: E711 - Leave No Van Behind / Sponsor Tripped
programme.desc: Vanzilla breaks down. // Lynn and friends enjoy free perks around Royal Wood.

programme.title: E515 - Director's Rut / Friday Night Fights
programme.desc: Luan turns to Mr. Coconuts for help after she struggles to direct her school's play. // Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that math will always beat out heart.

programme.title: E202 - Wrong Text / Emergency Family Tribunal
programme.desc: Jack gets his first phone and immediately sends the wrong text to Will, forcing the kids to do whatever it takes to delete it. // When the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni and only a family tribunal will set the record straight.

programme.title: E227 - Ithink They Kissed
programme.desc: When Sam accidentally reveals to Carly that she and Freddie shared a secret kiss, Carly confronts them both about why they never told her about it. Meanwhile, Spencer goes to prison to teach an art class to convicts.

programme.title: E115 - The Great Ping-Pong Scam
programme.desc: Tori discovers that her friends have been secretly going to a fancy restaurant instead of playing in an annual ping pong tournament.

programme.title: E212 - The Big Muck
programme.desc: Who kidnapped Rod? Where is the mutagen? Why is Rod's family so weird? Everything has led to a confrontation of Rod's dad... but even with Rod's help, can Mikey and his brothers defeat the mutant known as MUCKMAN?

programme.title: E320 - Bizarro Bottom / Squidward's Tough Break
programme.desc: SpongeBob falls asleep on the bus and ends up in a strange town full of Bikini Bottom doppelgangers. // After Squidward loses his memory, he adopts a new tough guy persona.

programme.title: E114 - Shell-Shock / The Amazing Coat Man
programme.desc: The twins and Marsupilamis save an egg from the Jaguar, which hatches into a baby crocodile. // The Marsupilamis are helping people, and Callie wants to find out who the 'Amazing Coat Man' hero is.

programme.title: E205 - Just A Little Pipe Problem / Camp Chuck
programme.desc: The Groom & Board gets a surprise inspection, but the broken pipe Jack and Lil neglected to fix might ruin them all. // Chuck's got a new hustle: theatre camp! Jack & Lil are sure it's a scam. But there's more to the chaotic show than they realized.

programme.title: E309 - Bad Luck Bob / The Sandman Cometh
programme.desc: SpongeBob experiences a bad luck streak when his lucky tie clip suddenly goes missing. // When Patrick can't fall asleep, he seeks assistance from the Sandman.

programme.title: E109 - To Dad And Back / Survivoring
programme.desc: Patrick ventures inside Cecil to learn how the body works. // Cecil takes his kids camping, but Squidina wants the drama of reality TV.

programme.title: E114 - Shell-Shock / The Amazing Coat Man
programme.desc: The twins and Marsupilamis save an egg from the Jaguar, which hatches into a baby crocodile. // The Marsupilamis are helping people, and Callie wants to find out who the 'Amazing Coat Man' hero is.

programme.title: E118
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E118
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E1 - The Gateway To The Verdon
programme.desc: At the gateway to the Verdon, Hugo Guinet harvests spinach and raises chickens. Philippe de Santis heads off in search of truffles, once cleaned his precious harvest will be sold at the market in Aups. And, to end, we go hiking in the mountains to discover their biodiversity.

programme.title: E13 - Azou Riding The Waves
programme.desc: In 2022, filmmaker Lisa Diaz chose young Azou to star in her feature film ''Libre Garance!''. Today, Azou is 15 and starting a new chapter in life as she enters tenth grade at the certified surf training center in Pont-l'Abbe.

programme.title: E7 - A Life Of Simplicity In The Acadian Forest
programme.desc: Julien is welcomed by Anne Galant who hand-built her house on Prince Edward Island. She shares her story and explains how it led to her living a simple life in a haven of peace and tran-quillity.

programme.title: E5 - Dave
programme.desc: Dave presents his adopted village, Saumane-de-Vaucluse. An intimate, musical escape into the heart of the Provence the artist holds dear.

programme.title: E15 - Cycling Itinerary
programme.desc: More and more tourists are looking for cycling, kayaking or horseback itineraries lasting one or several days. In the Ourthe-Vesdre-Ambleve region, in the province of Liege, Nathalie tries out a formula combining accommodation, heritage promotion and local products. All by bike!

programme.title: Saas Bahu Aur Sensex
programme.desc: Upper middle-class women quit daytime soaps to start investing in the stock market, seeking financial independence, new skills, and chances to shape their futures. Release Year: 2008 Director: Shona Urvashi

programme.title: Golmaal-Returns
programme.desc: Ekta Santoshi, obsessed with daytime soaps, suspects her husband Gopal of cheating. Her investigation spirals into hilarious chaos, leading to Gopal's wrongful arrest for a murder he didn't commit! Release Year: 2008 Director: Rohit Shetty Awards: 2009 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Supporting Actor- TuSShar Kapoor

programme.title: Laaga Chunari Mein Daag
programme.desc: This story is about a woman who does not hesitate in making sacrifices to financially support her family by working as an Escort. Release Year: 2007 Director: Pradeep Sarkar

programme.title: Kahin Pyaar Na Ho Jaaye
programme.desc: Prem starts drinking as all the girls he falls in love with want to marry 'a rich boy from the US'. Will he marry the girl of his dreams? Release Year: 2000 Director: K. Muralimohana Rao

E33 - Where Did You Get That Cat?/Valuable Lessons
programme.desc: Mr Bean is wracked with guilt after he chases Scrapper and ends up with a flattened cat.

programme.title: E171 - Funny Book Bunny/ Balloon Salesman: All The Balloons/ Kitty Krashers/Looney Tunes Car
programme.desc: Elmer tries his hand as an artist. Daffy’s business is full of hot air. Porky adopts the wrong kitten.

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/Muscle Woman/Video Game Wizard/Payback/Party Bus/Every Me
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E459 - All Out For Silk/Hello Grizzy? Here Lemmings!/Grasshopper Bounty/Sound And Light/Hero
programme.desc: Grizzy and the Lemmings fight over a silkworm that produces an extremely soft and resistant thread.

programme.title: E52 - K-O!: Part 3
programme.desc: In the wake of their defeat by KubiKO, Amato and MechaBot are captured and thrown into a brutal fight against Rubika in the Space Prison Arena.

programme.title: E182 - The Inquisition/The Sucker/The Cage/The Rival/The One
programme.desc: The students of Elmore Junior High find their world turned upside down when the mysterious school superintendent comes to stamp out their cartoonish ways. But who wants to be normal? Certainly not Gumball and Darwin...

programme.title: E172 - Birthday Grifts/ Daffy Magician: Vintage /Porkys Tub-O-War/Oregon Fail/ Duck Hunting
programme.desc: Elmer throws a birthday party. Porky goes old school. Marvin the Martian tries to give his dog a bath.

programme.title: E79 - The Traitor/The Advice/The Signal/The Girlfriend/The Parasite
programme.desc: Gumball has, through gritted teeth, prepared a special dinner for Alan, to apologise for the way he has treated him in the past. When Alan cancels, Gumball is overjoyed until a post on Elmore Plus reveals Alan lied about his Mum being sick, and is having a day of fun with his family instead. Gumball tracks down the traitor to give him a piece of his mind, but when he finds out his Mum really is sick he has to find a way to make it up to him.

programme.title: E1327 - Creative Geniuses/Manor And Mannerisms/Polly Ethylene And Tara Phthalate/Eebows/Batma
programme.desc: The Titans visit the Jump City Comic Book Con where they meet Marv Wolfman and George Pérez, but also tangle with Control Freak over an exclusive toy.

programme.title: E27 - A. Conquest of Cuteness/Morituri Te Salutamus/Memory of a Memory/Hitman/Too Young
programme.desc: King Snuggadoodle and the Huggaboopies invade Finn and Jake's tree house.

programme.title: E103 - Back To The Moon/Bubbled/It Could Have Been Great
programme.desc: Steven and the Gems revisit the Moon Base.

programme.title: E4 - Caffeinated Concert Tickets/Karaoke Video/Busted Cart/Country Club/Catching The Wave
programme.desc: Mordecai and Rigby work overtime in order to get tickets to a Fist Pump concert. While working, they drink lots of coffee to keep them active.

programme.title: E6 - Swimming Buddy
programme.desc: Lazlo helps Raj prepare for the camp swimming test, but Raj is terrified of even the tiniest drop of water!

programme.title: E2 - This One Goes To 11
programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: E3 - Moor Fogg
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: E4 - Rath Of Con
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.desc: During one last stop by a toy store before Ben, Gwen, and Grandpa Max's maiden voyage across the Atlantic, Ben runs into an old bully, Kevin 11, who now has new powers - able to transform into aliens just like Ben, such as the 'bootleg' doppelgänger of Cannonbolt-- Wreckingbolt!

programme.title: E3 - Moor Fogg
programme.desc: Team Tennyson goes international in the Omni-Copter and the first stop is for a hike in the Scottish Highlands, but the weather isn't just bad, it's foggy, and that means one thing and one thing only: the return of The Fogg!

programme.title: E4 - Rath Of Con
programme.desc: Back stateside, Ben can't get into a cat cosplay competition, Top Tail, without a costume of his own, but when he goes Rath - a new cat-like alien with an attitude - Ben's newfound wild side quickly becomes much more than he bargained for.

programme.title: E5 - Not In My Backyard
programme.desc: A strange monster called a Batoot is separating from its herd. The Batoot is bad luck and causes mayhem in its wake.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali's Greatest Fight
programme.desc: An HBO Original film that looks at Muhammad Ali's historic Supreme Court battle from behind closed doors.

programme.title: E1173
programme.desc: Each week Hollywood On Set goes behind-the-scenes on three major movies in production, featuring action footage and interviews with filmmakers.

programme.desc: Cady is a hit with the A-list clique at her new school, until she makes the mistake of falling for one of their ex-boyfriends.

programme.desc: After decades of ruling over his subjects at the Texas Renaissance Festival, 86-year-old George Coulam begins the search for a successor.

programme.desc: The Bastide, Estrela, Salama, Levy, Berville and Alami families, plus a host of supporting characters, live and work in the modern everyday city of Montpellier, in southern France. programme.title: E1 - From Fort To A Bunker
programme.desc: Saint-Vaast-la-Hougue, in the Cotentin, where volunteers are working to restore two towers designed by Vauban and built by Napoleon. programme.title: E15
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E11
programme.desc: 資訊工程學系和模特兒系意外合併，燃起了一段閃耀的青春戀情。人氣網紅模特兒姜敏學和對愛情一無所知的優等生朱妍山，成為了新合併系的宣傳模特兒。他們個性上的碰撞，成就了一個溫馨爆笑的愛情故事。

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious
programme.desc: Baogu At The Movie brings you the most exclusive behind the scenes of recent local blockbusters. The most true story and sincere conversation behind every piece of dreamwork.

programme.title: No Other Choice
programme.desc: You Man-su, a specialist in paper manufacturing with 25 years of experience, is so satisfied with life that he can truthfully tell himself, “I've got it all.” While happily passing his days with his wife Miri, their two children and two dogs, Man-su is suddenly informed by his company that he has been fired. “We're sorry. We have no other choice.” Feeling shocked as if his head had been cut off by an ax, Man-su vows to find himself a new job within the next three months for the sake of his family. Despite his firm resolve to turn his life around, Man-su spends over a year drifting from one job interview after another, and working at a retail store. He eventually finds himself in danger of losing the very house that he struggled so hard to buy. Desperate, he visits Moon Paper out of the blue and tries to hand over his CV, but he just ends up getting humiliated by line manager Choi Sun-chul. Man-su knows he is better qualified than anyone to work at Moon Paper, so he comes to a

programme.title: Baogu At the Movie E290 -The Furious

programme.title: Running On Karma
programme.desc: Bodybuilder and striper Biggie can see into people's past lives. He meets rookie cop Yee and help her track down criminals. Yee decides to help him back while Biggie decides to......

programme.title: The Pioneer
programme.desc: It tells the tale of Li Da Zhao's revolutionary deeds from 1912 to 1927, and the stories of human beings with lofty beliefs and innovative pioneers underneath his management who devoted themselves to the awesome cause of Marxism.

programme.title: Look For A Star
programme.desc: It's hardly a coincidence that Sam is considered the most eligible bachelor in town. Not only is he a young, smart, and insightful entrepreneur with a coveted fortune, but he also happens to be a blithe spirit with a carefree attitude to life. However, every success has its price. Sam has already divorced three times and finds himself crawling back to the game of love sooner than he has expected. It is love at first sight when Sam chances upon a feisty, fast-talking woman with the odd name of Milan at a Macau casino. But the catch is, she is a part-time poker dealer and a full-time cabaret dancer, “careers” not exactly congruent with his station in life. Fallen in love against all odds, this mismatched couple soon makes headline in all media which turn Milan into an It girl overnight...

programme.desc: Believed to bring luck, Vrinda marries her dream man, Sanjay, who loves Divya. Living as a caretaker, she faces silent sacrifices, unsure if fate will choose her.

programme.desc: Anu, a kind 20-year-old, and Aryavardhan, a resolute 45-year-old businessman, defy societal norms and family resistance, overcoming struggles to demonstrate that love transcends age or boundaries.

programme.title: Viva Erotica
programme.desc: Leslie is a young film director whose works had poor box office. Being unemployed, he gets an offer to direct a vulgar commercial film. He has to succumb to the reality...

programme.title: Midnight Girls
programme.desc: Blackie and Ling are working in a reputable business firm. Blackie who was a night club hostess and is now living with her boyfriend. Ling does not like office work. So she takes on a part time job as ballroom hostess but keeps it a secret. Blackie's boyfriend reneges on his promise to marry her, giving her past as his pretext. And soon the office gets word the two girls have been midnight girls. They both have to resign and become night club hostesses. They are keen to make big money so they try to get racing tips from a young jockey...

programme.title: SUPERCOP.COM
programme.desc: Zhao libing, an outstanding member of the Hong Kong special police force, was selected to attend special training in Seoul. During the training process, Bing met Li Ziping and Jin Yuqi, and instructor Zhang was very strict with them. After the graduation ceremony, Bing said goodbye to Qi and Ping and Cheng Zhengde sent her to the airport. They were busy with their jobs. Bing cracked a counterfeit banknote case in Hong Kong. One of the prisoners was willing to be a tainted witness and said that the mastermind was in South Korea. Bing accompanied with the Interpol to escort the tainted witness to Seoul...

programme.title: E10 - 求職者吐槽進大廠的落差
programme.desc: 打破傳統求職單向選擇的邏輯，從企業「滅燈挑錯」的評判模式，升級為發掘求職者自身閃光點的賦能模式。企業面試官可以隨時爆燈拋出橄欖枝，同步明確崗位與薪酬待遇，大幅拓寬求職者的選擇空間，讓雙向匹配更高效、更真誠。
